title: Anatomy of a Ricardian Contract
description: A visual breakdown of the core components and flow of a Ricardian contract, showing how it connects a legal agreement to a blockchain transaction.
relationships: The Legal Agreement is cryptographically hashed to create a unique identifier
The Hash is embedded into the Smart Contract's code and/or a Blockchain Transaction
The Transaction is executed on the blockchain, immutably linking the legal terms to the digital action
